feat.name: Surging Blood Magic
feat.prerequisite: Rising Blood Magic; master in *Arcana* or *Religion*, depending on your chosen tradition
feat.text: Your blood courses with magic. You gain the expert spellcasting benefits. In addition, when you Cast a Spell from your repertoire and you are at least drained 2, increase the extra damage dealt by that spell from Rage by an additional 2 (for a total of 3).

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
